catalogData.name: The Hunt
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Blood Frenzy
powers.raw: Blood Frenzy (Trait): +2DV if target has Wounded status

powers.name: Aid Journey
powers.raw: Aid Journey (Complex Action, Sustained 8 hours): (Force) targets increase Movement Rate (Force/2)m

powers.name: Aid Mysticism
powers.raw: Aid Mysticism (Sustained): Target gains +Force/2 on Astral Tracking test
powers.text: Target gains +Force/2 on Astral Tracking test

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Bind at Force

powers.name: Search
powers.raw: Search (Sustained): Find individual anywhere within Magic x100m of you.
powers.text: Find individual anywhere within Magic x100m of you.

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Outdoors if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Outdoors if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Baleful
greatFormPowers.raw: Baleful (Trait): Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
greatFormPowers.text: Gain +6 DV to attacks instead of +2
